title: Show HN: Robotics runtime in the browser (flight controller, WebAssembly)
full_text:
Star us on GitHub
 copper-project/copper-rs
 
 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 Focus
 Click to focus on either the Sim or the monitor.
 Left is the flight sim. Right is the live Copper monitor.
 

 

 Sim Controls
 Press Space to arm.
 
 Then throttle up. Use W A S D to move and
 Q / E for yaw.
 
 

 

 Monitor Controls
 Click tabs or press 1, 2, 3
 Use ← and → to scroll monitor views.
